title: Citrusy Crunchy Cozy Leek Stir-fry
description: A Mediterranean-inspired vegan dish featuring leeks that are blanched to keep their crunchiness and coated in a citrus-y marinade before stir-frying for a cozy, citrusy treat.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: For better flavor and texture, use extra virgin olive oil.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 orange
ingredients.notes: Combine with lemon juice for a sweeter citrus taste.

ingredients.name: 1 red pepper, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Optional for added color and crunch.

instructions: Wash the leek thoroughly and slice it into thin rings.
Blanch the sliced leeks in boiling water for about 2 minutes, until they just become limp. Drain well and set aside to cool.
In a mixing bowl, combine lemon juice, orange juice, minced garlic, salt, and pepper. Mix well to create the marinade.
Drizzle the olive oil over the drained leeks in the mixing bowl with the marinade. Toss until all pieces are evenly coated.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Once hot, add the marinated leeks along with optional red pepper if using.
Stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes, until the leeks are tender and slightly crispy on the edges. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve warm as a side dish or on its own as an appetizer.
